prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 90.7 kg; Height 168.4 cm; BMI 32.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 190mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 90.8kg; 9 months ago 90.8kg; 6 months ago 90.2kg; 3 months ago 89.2kg; current 90.7kg), Height (12 months ago 168.4cm; 9 months ago 168.4cm; 6 months ago 168.4cm; 3 months ago 168.4cm; current 168.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 80mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; current 81mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 28mg/g; 9 months ago 26mg/g; 6 months ago 27mg/g; 3 months ago 36mg/g; current 29mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 109mg/dL; 6 months ago 107mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.2g/dL; 6 months ago 14.9g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 14.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.26 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
